issues.description: Uses 'any' type in generateMockReview(contract: any) parameter
AI call has no explicit timeout (relies on fetch default which may hang)
AI call has no explicit timeout configuration
Uses 'any' type in several places (planData, taxCalculation)
No AI calls in this function
Uses 'any' type in updateCostLedgerOCR and createAuditLog
AI/OCR call has no explicit timeout configuration

warnings: All Edge Functions use 'any' type in places where specific interfaces should be used
No explicit timeout configuration for AI API calls (Deno fetch default may cause hanging)
Financial planning function has no AI dependency but could benefit from AI-powered suggestions

fixes_applied.issue: contract_reviews table missing RLS policy for sales_team block verification
fixes_applied.status: VERIFIED - Policy contract_reviews_agent_insert exists with WITH CHECK

verdict_reason: Phase 1 验收基本通过。所有4个新模块已实现且可调用，数据库向前兼容，RLS策略正确应用。但存在以下需改进项：1) 所有函数都使用了 'any' 类型而非具体接口；2) AI API 调用缺少显式超时配置可能导致 Function 挂起；3) 建议在后续迭代中增加类型安全性和错误处理增强。
fixes_verified: contract_reviews 表 RLS 正确启用，sales_team 角色无法访问
tax_calculations 四档税率计算逻辑正确（50%/100%/200% 分界点）
financial_plans 现金流预测公式：inflow - outflow = net_flow
ocr_jobs 表 ocr_confidence < 0.8 时 needs_review=true
next_steps: Phase 1 验收通过（带警告），可部署到生产环境但需监控
创建 Git Tag: git tag -a v0.3.0-phase1-accepted -m "Phase 1 accepted with warnings on 2026-06-07"
在 deno.json 中为所有 Edge Functions 添加 timeout_seconds 配置（建议30秒）
重构 'any' 类型为具体接口定义，提升 TypeScript 类型安全性
